ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., State Primary 2023) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general, municipal) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the election is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the ward belongs to */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "polling_location" TEXT /* Polling location for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party the candidate belongs to */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the candidate is running for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "provisional_votes" INTEGER /* Number of provisional votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "totals" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "total_vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_totals_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_totals_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_totals" (
  "city_total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city total record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "city_vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_totals_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_totals_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_totals_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ward_totals" (
  "ward_total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward total record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "ward_vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate in the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ward_totals_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ward_totals_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ward_totals_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precinct_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precinct_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precinct_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record where the change occurred */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field where the change occurred */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
